'''tadumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kynurenate|kynurenate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kynurenate|kynurenate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tadumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædimith|tædimith]] || [[word:tædimij|tædimij]] || [[word:tædimish|tædimish]] || [[word:tædimi|tædimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadudumuth|tadudumuth]] || [[word:tadudumuj|tadudumuj]] || [[word:tadudumush|tadudumush]] || [[word:tadudumu|tadudumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadumuth|tadumuth]] || [[word:tadumuj|tadumuj]] || [[word:tadumush|tadumush]] || [[word:tadumu|tadumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadufmuth|tadufmuth]] || [[word:tadufmuj|tadufmuj]] || [[word:tadufmush|tadufmush]] || [[word:tadufmuf|tadufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadumuthu|tadumuthu]] || [[word:tadumuju|tadumuju]] || [[word:tadumushu|tadumushu]] || [[word:tadumuku|tadumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadumuth|tadumuth]] || [[word:tadumuj|tadumuj]] || [[word:tadumush|tadumush]] || [[word:tadumu|tadumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadumuthul|tadumuthul]] || [[word:tadumujul|tadumujul]] || [[word:tadumushul|tadumushul]] || [[word:tadumukul|tadumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadumuthuthu|tadumuthuthu]] || [[word:tadumujuju|tadumujuju]] || [[word:tadumushushu|tadumushushu]] || [[word:tadumuku|tadumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadumuthun|tadumuthun]] || [[word:tadumujun|tadumujun]] || [[word:tadumushun|tadumushun]] || [[word:tadumukun|tadumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadumuthuoro|tadumuthuoro]] || [[word:tadumujuoro|tadumujuoro]] || [[word:tadumushuoro|tadumushuoro]] || [[word:tadumukuoro|tadumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
